message:
Add alert routing, adaptive collection, playbook autogen, knowledge
mining, and natural language query modules

Alert routing (vc_alert/src/routing.rs, 910 lines):
- RoutingEngine evaluates configurable rules sorted by priority with
  MatchCondition support for severity lists, machine name globs, and
  alert rule patterns
- QuietWindow suppression during configurable time windows with
  day-of-week and timezone support
- EscalationPolicy with SLA timeouts, max escalation levels, and
  initial/escalation channel routing
- Deduplication of delivery targets across matching rules
- Store integration logging all routing decisions for audit

Adaptive collection (vc_collect, 3 new modules):
- node.rs (539 lines): vc-node push agent with BundleManifest,
  BundleBuilder, store-and-forward spooling, and content-hash-based
  deduplication via SipHash
- redact.rs (633 lines): PII/secret redaction pipeline with 8 default
  patterns (AWS keys, GitHub tokens, bearer tokens, private keys, SSH
  keys, generic secrets, emails, RFC 1918 IPs), field allowlisting,
  recursive JSON walking, and audit event logging
- scheduler.rs (667 lines): Adaptive poll scheduler with priority-based
  decision pipeline (profiling burst > quarantine > failure backoff >
  alert response > freshness recovery > default), exponential backoff,
  and store-logged decisions

Playbook autogen (vc_guardian/src/autogen.rs, 1350 lines):
- Automatic playbook generation from observed resolution patterns
- CapturedAction enum covering Command, AccountSwitch, ProcessKill,
  ConfigChange, ServiceRestart, and Custom action types
- PatternDetector finds recurring resolution patterns with configurable
  minimum count and confidence thresholds
- PlaybookGenerator orchestrates capture -> detect -> draft -> safety
  check -> approval pipeline
- SafetyCheck validates no destructive actions, action count limits,
  and timeout configuration before activation

Knowledge mining (vc_knowledge/src/mining.rs, 538 lines):
- SolutionMiner extracts ProblemSolutionPair records from unmined agent
  sessions with quality scoring based on token count
- Deduplication prevents re-mining previously processed sessions
- Integration with KnowledgeStore for persisting extracted solutions

Natural language query (vc_query/src/nl.rs, 1153 lines):
- NlEngine translates plain English questions to SQL via keyword-based
  intent classification with 16 QueryIntent variants
- Entity extraction handles machine names, time ranges (today,
  yesterday, this week, N hours), severity levels, and result limits
- SQL template generation with WHERE clause injection and entity
  substitution for safe query construction
- Confidence scoring based on keyword match strength

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
